basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Young Professional - I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) Young Professional - I (YP-I) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iari.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR-IARI Young Professional - I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Women and other exempted categories as per ICAR / GOI guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduates in relevant subjects or Diploma holder in relevant Agricultural Sciences/Engineering/Technology, Working knowledge of computer and MS Office, Hands-on-experience in seed pathology
qualification.details: Graduates in relevant subjects or Diploma holder in relevant Agricultural Sciences/Engineering/Technology. Desirable: Working knowledge of computer and MS Office, Hands-on-experience in seed pathology.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-IARI YP-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date for the interview and registration process.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional – I post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be Graduates in relevant subjects or Diploma holders in relevant Agricultural Sciences/Engineering/Technology. Working knowledge of computers and MS Office, along with hands-on experience in seed pathology, is also desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional – I position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government guidelines for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional – I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional – I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional – I (YP-I) position at ICAR-IARI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being done through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear in person at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for ICAR-IARI YP-I recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute, New Delhi - 110012.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Young Professional – I post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.
